title: lyonia calycosa
intro: Lyonia calycosa, also known as the fern-leaf holly or mountain holly, is a deciduous shrub native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties due to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as alkaloids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Lyonia calycosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Lyonia calycosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses.
